label: About
title: About Signal Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 30 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around El Sumergible Neuronal and Late '90s / Early '00s Japanese Ambient Techno and Electronica Mix【 THE NTS GUIDE TO… 】, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Signal Field: A full-bleed abstract expressionist artwork for 2026-04-30: one large open color field is crossed by a single disruptive threshold gesture. Small source-bearing interruptions sit quietly inside the field as marks, apertures, scars, cuts, line breaks, and shallow listening slits. After the image was made, the mask pass used geometry and contour candidates to attach source windows to the visible marks.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
